name: Taiwan Paiho Limited
summary: Taiwan Paiho Limited manufactures and sells touch fastener, webbings, elastic, easy tapes, and fabrics in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers general footwear and webbings for garments, shoelaces, and pull strings; touch fasteners; knitted elastic, flat woven elastic, jacquard elastic, and multi-directional textile with elasticity; easy tape products for applications in paper diapers, medical equipment, computer pipelines, outdoor sporting goods, car seats and interiors, and other accessories; bamboo charcoal yarn, bamboo charcoal insulation cotton, recycled pet yarn, and other processed products; powder coating products for use in furniture, appliances, etc.; and jacquard digital woven fabric and jacquard engineered mesh that is used in fabrics for shoes, garments, and hats and bags. It also sells houses and apartment buildings. In addition, the company engages in the production and marketing of computerized embroidery, consumer electronic accessories, chemical fibers, and masks and non-woven products; commercial property management; planning consultant, sale, development, and leasing of real estate; and provision of design decoration services. The company was formerly known as San Ho Hsin Limited and changed its name to Taiwan Paiho Limited in 1986. Taiwan Paiho Limited was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Changhua, Taiwan.
